name: Carpal tunnel from repetitive work in Boise Idaho, covered?

mainEntity.name: Carpal tunnel from repetitive work in Boise Idaho, covered?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes as occupational disease if job-caused.** Idaho requires medical proof[6]. **Key factors:** Exceeds everyday stress. **Practical guidance:** Report, get specialist diagnosis, document tasks. **Broad coverage for RSI.**
